name: @oktopeak/mycase-mcp
description: Open-source Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that connects Claude to MyCase legal practice management. 21 tools covering cases, contacts, documents, tasks, calendar, calls, time entries, billing, and staff. Built for law firms with AES-256 encrypted OAuth token storage. Built by Oktopeak.

scripts.lint:version-sync: node -e "const p=require('./package.json');const s=require('./server.json');if(p.version!==s.version)throw new Error('Version mismatch: package.json='+p.version+' server.json='+s.version)"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run lint:version-sync && npm test && npm run build

author: Oktopeak <office@oktopeak.com> (https://oktopeak.com)
